CustomField.inlineHelpText: Choice of Forum per the lease agreement (eg. Exclusive, Non-Exclusive Jurisdiction and for which party)
CustomField.label: Choice of Forum

value.fullName: Yes - Exclusive to Lessee and Lessor
value.label: Yes - Exclusive to Lessee and Lessor

value.fullName: Yes - Exclusive to Lessee but not to Lessor
value.label: Yes - Exclusive to Lessee but not to Lessor

value.fullName: Yes - Non Exclusive to neither Lessee nor Lessor
value.label: Yes - Non Exclusive to neither Lessee nor Lessor
